title: Deck Stage Frame Glow
summary: Added sticky scanline and glow chrome to bounded deck stages, preserving the All deck as a clean full audit view.
proof: Added lightweight animated scanline and glow chrome to bounded deck-stage sections.
Kept the All deck pseudo-elements disabled so the full audit/export view stays clean.
Updated README, cache markers, snapshot generation, and regression floors so the standalone dashboard records the polish unlock.
